title: AI instruction files and development directories in release payload
summary: AI instruction files and development-only directories should not ship in a WordPress.org plugin release payload.

detection.notes: The current shell script only covers part of the official file-type surface. The structured rules layer should grow with Plugin Check changes.

guidance.why_it_matters: These files are development artifacts and can trigger repository review issues if included in the shipped plugin.
guidance.fix: Exclude AI instruction files and development directories from the release build or distribution archive.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Low. This is a release-payload concern, not a source-repo concern.
